---
title: "\'paper on boy literature\'"
---

## \'paper on boy literature\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1865
**Genre:** literary criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Literary Churchman</i>

### Notes

Mentioned to Alexander Macmillan and not yet identified.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
